title: Youtube Poop: Sindri Goes Batshit
description:
Sindri goes completely batshit one day and freezes that old woman by the nonexistant fountain.  Morshu the Shopkeeper is moved by Bale's plight and offers lamp oil, rope, and bombs, which he readily accepts.  Bale then begins his long quest to bomb Sindri, winning many battles with his suspiciously UVA-colored Chaos Space Marines until he goes head to head with Sindri himself.  Sindri offers to make Pathetic Creatures die if Bale joins him and he accepts.  However, Gabriel Angelos is not satisfied and banhammers the bomb Bale wanted to bomb Sindri with, ending all.

Probably going to remix this later.
